assumptions: No Astro account or Deployment exists.
No Astro CLI install is assumed.

developer_goal: Start an Astro trial, create a Deployment, deploy the example project via GitHub Actions, and trigger the example DAG.

first_success.outcome: example_astronauts is deployed to the Astro Deployment and a DAG run is visible in the Airflow UI.
first_success.observable_signal: Opening example_astronauts in the Airflow UI shows DAG run grid columns for completed or running task instances.

route_selection.surface: Astro trial + first DAG via GitHub Actions
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Astro trial + first DAG via GitHub Actions

candidates.name: Astro trial + first DAG via GitHub Actions
candidates.reason: Astro trial creates a hosted account, Organization, and Workspace. Run your first dag offers GitHub Actions as the no-local-tool path that deploys to a managed Deployment and triggers example_astronauts in the Airflow UI. Local Astro CLI is a peer that installs tooling on the laptop.

required_path.action: Start the Astro trial, create Organization and Workspace, and open the Astro UI.
Create a Deployment and wait until status is Healthy.
Fork the official example Astro project repository on GitHub and enable Actions workflows.
required_path.observable_result: Astronomer CI - Deploy Code workflow is runnable.

required_path.action: Create a Deployment API token and copy Deployment ID from the Astro UI.
Run the Astronomer CI - Deploy Code workflow with Deployment ID and API token.
required_path.observable_result: Workflow completes and DAGs appear on the Deployment.

required_path.action: Open example_astronauts in the Airflow UI and confirm a DAG run.

prerequisites.description: Astro trial account with Organization and Workspace.
GitHub account to fork the example project and run Actions.

sources.title: Run your first Dag with GitHub Actions

uncertainties.question: Are all signup and first-success fields for Astronomer fully enumerated in public docs?
uncertainties.impact: Atomic field counts inside account or billing steps may be incomplete.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Live console fields can differ from documentation screenshots.
